mapper.sql: SELECT definition_id, workflow_key, workflow_name, version, definition_status, is_current, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM ticket_workflow_definition
mapper.select: WHERE workflow_key = #{workflowKey} AND definition_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND is_current = '1'
WHERE workflow_key = #{workflowKey} ORDER BY version DESC LIMIT 1
WHERE workflow_key = #{workflowKey} ORDER BY version DESC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket_workflow_definition (workflow_key, workflow_name, version, definition_status, is_current, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark) VALUES (#{workflowKey}, #{workflowName}, #{version}, #{definitionStatus}, #{current}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_workflow_definition SET workflow_name = #{workflowName}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} WHERE definition_id = #{definitionId} AND definition_status = 'DRAFT'
UPDATE ticket_workflow_definition SET is_current = '0' WHERE workflow_key = #{workflowKey} AND is_current = '1'

UPDATE ticket_workflow_definition SET definition_status = #{definitionStatus}, is_current = #{current}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE definition_id = #{definitionId} AND definition_status = 'DRAFT'
